intro: The Way of the Tray is a waiter simulator with action puzzle elements in a Japanese spirit world setting.
description:
After accidentally falling into the mystical world of spirits, you find yourself in a difficult situation: to find your way home, you will have to work in a local restaurant.

- Dishes from myths and legends
- Mysterious yokai patrons
- Magical restaurant makeover
- The way of the masterful waite

Master the art of keeping your tray balanced: every mistake can cost you a tip. Learn to manage your time so you can serve all your guests on time and prevent them from leaving because of long waiting time.
Immerse yourself in the mysterious atmosphere of Japan: serve unusual orders to yokai and learn all the secrets of local cuisine. Serve dishes that even mysterious spirits can enjoy. Today’s menu includes onigiri, sushi and ramen, and fortune cookies for dessert!
Develop your waiter skills to earn more tips and invest them in upgrades, and don’t forget to pay the rent.
Are you ready to make your way as a waiter in the mysterious world of Japanese spirits? Keep your balance, solve puzzles and find your way home!
